scope: Steel structures, steel-concrete composite structures, stainless steel structures, aluminum alloy structures, cold-formed steel, connections and joints, stability and buckling, fire engineering of steel structures, fatigue and fracture, seismic behavior of steel structures, tubular structures, steel bridges, castellated and cellular beams, thin-walled structures in steel, robustness and progressive collapse, AI/ML for steel structural analysis and design.

manuscript_structure.abstract_note: A concise summary of the work. State the objectives, principal methods, key results, and main conclusions. Do not include references or undefined abbreviations.
manuscript_structure.keywords_note: Specific keywords representing the main content. Avoid general terms and terms from the title where possible.
manuscript_structure.highlights_note: 3-5 bullet points, max 85 characters each including spaces. State the core findings clearly.
manuscript_structure.graphical_abstract_note: Optional. If provided, use TIFF, EPS, PDF, or MS Office format.

formatting.file_format: Word (.doc/.docx) or LaTeX (elsarticle class). PDF not acceptable as source.

references.format: Numbered in square brackets [1] in order of appearance
examples: [1] L. Gardner, D.A. Nethercot, Experiments on stainless steel hollow sections - Part 1: Material and cross-sectional behaviour, J. Constr. Steel Res. 60 (2004) 1291-1318.
[2] N.S. Trahair, M.A. Bradford, D.A. Nethercot, L. Gardner, The Behaviour and Design of Steel Structures to EC3, fourth ed., Taylor & Francis, London, 2008.
[3] B. Uy, Strength of short concrete filled high strength steel box columns, J. Constr. Steel Res. 57 (2001) 113-134.
references.formatting_rules: Author initials then surname. Article titles in regular text. Journal names in italics and abbreviated (ISO). Format: Journal Volume (Year) Pages. DOI required.

figures_tables.placement: embedded in text or end of manuscript
figures_tables.color_note: Free color for online publication. Ensure figures are distinguishable in grayscale for print.

submission_notes.equations: Numbered consecutively, numbers in parentheses flush right
submission_notes.math_notation: MathType or Word equation editor, or LaTeX math environments
submission_notes.ethical_requirements: Original unpublished work, not under review elsewhere. Declaration of competing interest required.
